name: Quad VCA
description: Four-channel voltage controlled amplifier with cascaded CV inputs and cascaded mix outputs. Each channel has variable linear-to-exponential response, a level bias knob, and a +6dB boost switch.

controls.name: CV Attenuator
controls.description: Controls amount of CV modulation applied to the channel's level. Cascades from previous channel if input unpatched.
controls.detail: 0 = no CV · full CW = unity CV

controls.name: Linear / Exponential Response
controls.description: Sets VCA response curve. Full CCW = exponential. Full CW = linear. In-between = variable blend.
controls.detail: CCW: exponential (natural loudness) · CW: linear (CV processing)

controls.name: Level 1
controls.description: Manual bias level for channel 1. Full CW ≈ +5V CV equivalent, unity gain in linear mode.

controls.name: Level 2
controls.description: Manual bias level for channel 2. Sets base gain without CV.

controls.name: Level 3
controls.description: Manual bias level for channel 3. Sets base gain without CV.

controls.name: Level 4
controls.description: Manual bias level for channel 4. Sets base gain without CV.

controls.name: BOOST Switch
controls.description: Increases output level by approximately +6dB (2:1). Useful for boosting low-level signals or mild overdrive.

controls.name: CV LED
controls.description: Bicolor LED shows post-attenuator CV signal level. Green = positive, red = negative voltage.

inputs.name: CV 1
inputs.description: CV input for channel 1 level control.

inputs.name: CV 2
inputs.description: CV input for channel 2. Normalled to CV 1 when unpatched.

inputs.name: CV 3
inputs.description: CV input for channel 3. Normalled to CV 2 when unpatched.

inputs.name: CV 4
inputs.description: CV input for channel 4. Normalled to CV 3 when unpatched.

inputs.name: IN 1
inputs.description: Audio or CV signal input for channel 1.

inputs.name: IN 2
inputs.description: Audio or CV signal input for channel 2.

inputs.name: IN 3
inputs.description: Audio or CV signal input for channel 3.

inputs.name: IN 4
inputs.description: Audio or CV signal input for channel 4.

outputs.name: OUT 1
outputs.description: Channel 1 output. Normalled to mix input of OUT 2 when unpatched.

outputs.name: OUT 2
outputs.description: Channel 2 output. Normalled to mix input of OUT 3 when unpatched.

outputs.name: OUT 3
outputs.description: Channel 3 output. Normalled to mix input of OUT 4 when unpatched.

outputs.name: OUT 4 / MIX
outputs.description: Channel 4 output. When OUT 1–3 are unpatched, serves as master mix output of all 4 channels.

behaviors.name: 4 Independent VCAs
behaviors.description: Each channel operates independently. Connect audio to IN, CV to CV input, take signal from OUT. LEVEL knob biases the gain. Response knob adjusts linear-to-exponential curve.

behaviors.name: Cascaded CV
behaviors.description: One CV controls multiple channels. Unpatched CV inputs inherit from the previous channel. Each channel's attenuator and response knob independently shape the cascaded CV amount.

behaviors.name: 4-Channel Mixer
behaviors.description: Leave OUT 1–3 unpatched; take mix from OUT 4/MIX. LEVEL knobs act as mix faders. CV inputs can automate individual channel levels.

patchIdeas.name: Envelope-controlled VCA with bias
patchIdeas.patch: Osc → IN 1 · Env → CV 1 · LEVEL at noon for minimal bleed · linear response
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quad VCA:
* Level 1: noon
* Linear / Exponential Response: Linear (CW)
- VCO (Out) -> Quad VCA (IN 1)
- Envelope (Out) >> Quad VCA (CV 1)
- Quad VCA (OUT 1) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Submix + independent voice
patchIdeas.patch: 3 voices → IN 1–3 · OUT 3 → destination (submix) · IN 4 independent → OUT 4 for fourth voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quad VCA:
- Voice 1 (Out) -> Quad VCA (IN 1)
- Voice 2 (Out) -> Quad VCA (IN 2)
- Voice 3 (Out) -> Quad VCA (IN 3)
- Quad VCA (OUT 3) -> Mixer (In A) // 3-voice submix
- Voice 4 (Out) -> Quad VCA (IN 4)
- Quad VCA (OUT 4 / MIX) -> Mixer (In B) // independent voice

patchIdeas.name: FM index control
patchIdeas.patch: Modulator osc → IN 1 · OUT 1 → FM input · LEVEL sets base index · Env → CV 1 for dynamic FM
patchIdeas.diagram:
Quad VCA:
* Level 1: base FM index
- Modulator VCO (Out) -> Quad VCA (IN 1)
- Envelope (Out) >> Quad VCA (CV 1) // dynamic index
- Quad VCA (OUT 1) >> Carrier VCO (FM In)
